subject: Discrete Random Variables
topic: §14 Probability Mass Function and Cumulative Distribution Function
question: A box contains 100 computer mice of which 95 are defective. (a) One mouse is taken from the box at a time (without replacement) until a nondefective mouse is found. Let $X$ be the number of mice you have to take out in order to find one that is not defective. Find the probability distribution of $X$. (b) Exactly 10 mice were taken from the box and then each of the 10 mice is tested. Let $Y$ denote the number of nondefective mice among the 10 that were taken out. Find the probability distribution of $Y$.
